name: Savoury Fruit Salad
steps: Blanch and peel skin of tomatoes.
Add xanthan to liquid with orange zest and salt.
Compress in bovic liquid and reserve.
Reserve juice in a bottle to garnish dish.
Vacuum pack with sugar and water for one week until softened and looks like jam.
Pick all the leaves off the branches.
Blanch, squeeze water and add to oil.
Blend until smooth and pass once.

other_details.extra: Extract water from the lab. Garnish with long pepper.
